member.name: M:JJ.Demos.Architecture.ExternalMerge.Merge``2(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{``0,JJ.Demos.Architecture.ValidatorBase{``1}},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{``0,JJ.Demos.Architecture.ValidatorBase{``1}})
member.summary: Merges two collections into one. When collections are empty, an empty collection is returned.
